name: idan-cocktails
description: Cocktails wiki — static Hebrew RTL catalog

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['index.html','bar-scanner.html','js/cocktails-data.js','js/radar.js','api/scan-bar.js','api/nearby-stores.js','assets/bg-video.mp4'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.accessSync(f)}catch(e){console.error('Missing:',f);process.exit(1)}});console.log('Build OK: static site and functions ready')"
